Livros online

https://bookdown.org/robinlovelace/geocompr/ https://geocompx.org/r

  • Spatial Data Science https://r-spatial.org/book/

  • Geographic Data Science with R: Visualizing and Analyzing Environmental Change https://bookdown.org/mcwimberly/gdswr-book/

  • R Programming for Climate Data Analysis and Visualization https://shen.sdsu.edu/pdf/R-TextBySamShen2017.pdf
